description_long: This object is a rectangular, upright book with a unique design resembling a large, vertical LEGO brick on its upper half, featuring eight raised circular studs. The lower half of the front cover is smooth and displays engraved or printed text, including the year 2018 and references to 'Master Builder' and 'Knox Bricks & Blocks.' The book is monochromatic, with a uniform light gray or white color throughout. The sides are flat and unadorned, while the back cover is completely plain with no visible markings or features. The overall appearance is modern and minimalistic, with a blocky, geometric form and a hard, matte finish.
description: A tall, rectangular book with a LEGO brick motif on the front and engraved text, finished in a uniform light gray color. The design is minimalistic and modern, with a hard, matte surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the LEGO brick pattern with eight raised studs on the upper half and engraved text on the lower half.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a flat, featureless surface and the thickness of the book.
description_view_2: The back view displays a completely plain, smooth surface with no markings or features.
description_view_3: The right side view is identical to the left, showing a flat, unadorned edge and the book's thickness.
